title: Sailing
description: A canonical cruise sailing record. Source of truth for both the Next.js web app (cruisekit.app) and the CruiseKit-Mobile Flutter app via Quicktype-generated models.

shipName.description: Human-readable ship name as marketed by the cruise line.

sailingName.description: Itinerary or voyage name as published by the cruise line, e.g. 'Eastern Caribbean from Miami'.

departurePort.description: Embarkation port name, e.g. 'Cape Liberty (Bayonne, NJ)'.

returnPort.description: Disembarkation port name. Equal to departurePort for round-trip sailings.

destinationRegion.description: Primary marketing region for the itinerary.

itineraryPorts.description: Ordered list of port-of-call names (excluding sea days). Embarkation/return ports may or may not be repeated here; consumers should not assume.

portCoordinates.description: Required field; may be empty at launch. Lat/lng for berth or port. ShipSafe SDK consumes this; missing entries should be tracked in PORT_COORDINATES_TODO.md and backfilled.

startingPrice.description: Cruise line's lowest advertised fare under priceBasis. Null only when the source page does not publish a starting price.

priceBasis.description: How startingPrice is quoted. 'unspecified' is permitted only when the source page does not state a basis.

taxesAndFeesIncluded.description: True if startingPrice already includes taxes and port fees as published; false if those are quoted separately.

directLink.description: Required. Direct cruise-line URL to the sailing detail page. CTAs use this when affiliateLink is not yet populated.

affiliateLink.description: Optional. Tracked affiliate URL (Awin, CJ, direct partner). When present, CTAs prefer this over directLink.

sourceUrl.description: Canonical URL of the page used to verify this record. Should match source.sourceUrl; held at top level for query/dedup convenience.

lastVerified.description: ISO date the record was last manually verified against the source page.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp the record was first added.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp the record was last modified (any field).

Confidence.title: Confidence
Confidence.description: Trust tier. Records with 'internal_do_not_publish' MUST be filtered before render.

portName.description: Must match a value in itineraryPorts (case-sensitive) or be the embarkation/return port.

berth.description: Optional berth or terminal name. ShipSafe SDK uses this when a single port has multiple terminals (e.g. Manhattan Pier 88 vs Pier 90).

source.description: Optional citation for the coordinate (e.g. 'cruise-line port guide', 'OpenStreetMap').

affiliateNetwork.description: Awin, CJ, Impact, etc. Null when sourceType is not 'affiliate-feed'.

termsNotes.description: Free-text reminder of source-specific ToS constraints (e.g. 'CJ feed: 24h cache TTL').
